common.siteDescription: Premium collectibles — mechanical models, figures, statues, and accessories.

errors.notFoundDescription: This page doesn't exist or may have been moved.
errors.runtimeDescription: We couldn't load this page. Try again or go back home.

home.title: Premium collectibles
home.subtitle: Mechanical models, figures, statues, and accessories — one curated catalog.

about.title: About
about.description: ORIGO — original only: authentic collectible products with verified origin.
about.heading: About ORIGO

intro.lead: ORIGO is more than just an online store.
intro.body: It is access to authentic collectible products that are hard to find in the CIS region. We create a space for people who value authenticity, quality, and long-term value. At ORIGO there are no random items and no compromises - only carefully selected products from global brands.

philosophy.title: Philosophy
philosophy.lead: We believe collectibles are not just a purchase.
philosophy.body: They are interest, emotion, and often an investment.

points.noMassAssortment: no mass assortment for quantity's sake

philosophy.tail: Every item is selected with care. Every product has clear provenance.

partnerships.title: Direct Partnerships
partnerships.body: ORIGO works directly with manufacturers and official distributors. We personally build supplier relationships, attend exhibitions, meet with companies, and organize supply without intermediaries.
partnerships.exclusive: ORIGO is an exclusive representative for a number of brands in the CIS region.
partnerships.access: That means limited access and products not available in the region's mass market.

assortment.title: Assortment
assortment.body: We focus on collectible categories with high value:

items.actionFigures: Action Figures - premium figures from leading studios
items.engineeringModelKits: Engineering Model Kits - complex mechanical models
items.advancedBuildingSets: Advanced Building Sets - high-end construction sets
items.tradingCards: Trading Cards - authentic collectible cards (Pokemon, One Piece, etc.)

assortment.tail: Each category is selected not by trend, but by quality, detail, and long-term value potential.

approach.title: Approach
approach.lead: We do not compete with mass market. We do not aim to be "the cheapest".
approach.tail: We work for people who understand the difference between a product and a collection.

points.rarityValue: For those who value rarity and quality.
points.authenticityConfidence: And for those who want confidence that they are buying an authentic product.

closing.title: Conclusion
closing.line1: ORIGO is a choice in favor of authenticity.
closing.line2: A choice in favor of quality.
closing.line3: A choice in favor of items that truly matter.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: Contact
contact.line1: По всем вопросам — быстрее всего связаться с нами в Telegram.
contact.line2: Мы оперативно отвечаем, помогаем с подбором и принимаем заказы.
contact.line4: Также вы можете написать нам на почту:
contact.line7: ответ по email может занимать больше времени.
contact.premiumLead: 💎 Более премиальная версия (если хочешь чище и короче)
contact.premiumLine2: Быстрое общение, консультации и оформление заказов.

clients.title: Our clients
clients.description: Who we work with: bloggers, streamers, and ORIGO partners.
clients.heading: Our clients
clients.intro: We collaborate with content creators and businesses that help grow collecting culture and connect products with the right audience.

bloggers.title: Bloggers
bloggers.text: Reviews, unboxings, and curated picks from bloggers help our products reach engaged collectors.

streamers.title: Streamers
streamers.text: Streamers showcase new arrivals live, share hands-on impressions, and build an active community around collectibles.

partners.title: Partners
partners.text: Partnerships with stores, media, and brands help us expand the catalog and launch joint initiatives.

categories.title: Categories
categories.description: Browse products by category — engineering models, figures, statues, accessories.
categories.subtitle: Find what you're looking for by category.

products.title: Products
products.description: Browse all collectible products — models, figures, statues, accessories.
products.subtitle: Browse our full catalog of collectibles.
